name: Ernie Rose Golf
about: Ernie Rose Golf is a premier golf simulator facility and training studio located in the Twin Cities. It specializes in providing a comprehensive golf experience using state-of-the-art Trackman simulators for both recreational play and serious skill development. The venue offers a wide array of services, including private lessons, club fitting, junior programs, leagues, and group events, catering to golfers of all ages and skill levels. With a strong emphasis on expert coaching and high-quality technology, the facility aims to help golfers improve their game through personalized instruction and immersive simulation experiences.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to state-of-the-art Trackman technology for accurate shot tracking
Comprehensive club fitting services by expert professionals
Wide range of programs and events for all skill levels and ages
Indoor facility allowing for year-round golf practice
Private lessons available from top teaching professionals

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service on-site
No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy

simulator_hardware.notes: Trackman technology mentioned for simulators and club fitting

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but they also provide club rentals and have an expert club fitting service to help you find the best equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There's no mention of outside food or drink policies, so it's best to contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes isn't specified, but typical simulator rounds typically take 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Ernie Rose Golf offers junior programs, camps, and birthday parties, making it a family-friendly environment for young golfers.
